description: Create a new holon in non-interactive / scripted mode.
notes: Returns { success: true, data: { id, name, ... } }.
Use mcp_invoke with oasis_save_holon for richer custom data fields — the CLI create is for simple holons.

example.description: Create a TimeCreditHolon for the PanGalacticTimebank OAPP
argv: Tracks time credits for the PanGalactic exchange
